title: Newthinking Lint Roller Refills, 900 Sheets of Extra Sticky Lint Roller Refills for Clothes Rollers and Pet Hair Remover, 90 Sheets Per
features: Affordable and Environmentally-Friendly Option: You will receive 10 extra sticky roller refills, 90 sheets per refill, 900 sheets total
Universal Refill For Most Rollers: Designed specialized for most standard size lint rollers in the market (4in wide, inner diameter at 1.57in), simply plug in those quality refill into the roller
Enhanced Additional Stickiness: Our lint roller refill have strong, enhanced stickiness to remove dog hair, cat hair, and stubborn lint from sofas and clothes in one go, saving lots of time
Easy Peeling: Compared with straight-cut sheets, our diagonal sheets feature easy-tearing. You can easily remove a used sheet with 2 fingers
100% Customer Satisfaction Promised: We are committed to providing customers with the best products and services. If you are not 100% satisfied with our lint rollers refill or have any issu
